testing_notes: Local dev server not running (port 3000 occupied by unrelated app, port 3001 refused). Production does not have iter 96 changes -- /activity resolves as [tabId] canvas view confirming changes not deployed. All 19 acceptance criteria verified via static code inspection on branch ralph/init-stride. Browser quality gate run on production canvas.

criteria_results.criterion: Initial load entries show user email (not Unknown)
criteria_results.evidence: page.tsx join returns users.email. activity-view.tsx line 176: entry.users?.email ?? Unknown resolves to email.

criteria_results.criterion: Both page.tsx and route.ts use identical .select() shape
criteria_results.evidence: page.tsx uses the user join. BUILD_RESULT_1: route.ts already had identical join.

criteria_results.criterion: IMP-018: empty state shows guidance hint below No activity yet
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx lines 145-149: conditional paragraph renders guidance text when activeFilter===all and no entries. text-[12px] text-[var(--text-tertiary)] mt-1.

criteria_results.criterion: Coloring panel accessible via paintbrush icon button in canvas toolbar
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx: Paintbrush imported. Button at absolute top-2.5 right-2.5 z-10 with aria-label=Toggle coloring rules.

criteria_results.criterion: Panel lists existing rules with color swatch, criteria type, criteria value, active toggle
criteria_results.evidence: coloring-panel.tsx: receives rules prop. CRITERIA_OPTIONS maps all 6 CriteriaType values. editForm includes all rule fields.

criteria_results.criterion: Add rule form: name, color (hex input), criteria_type dropdown, criteria_value input, save button
criteria_results.evidence: coloring-panel.tsx: addForm state with DEFAULT_ADD_FORM. HEX_REGEX client-validated (line 73). createColoringRule called on save.

criteria_results.criterion: Edit and delete existing rules inline or via controls
criteria_results.evidence: coloring-panel.tsx: editingId/editForm/editSaving state. updateColoringRule and deleteColoringRule imported from lib/api/client.

criteria_results.criterion: Rules evaluated client-side in position order -- last match wins
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx lines 179-215: coloringTints useMemo iterates activeRules by position. map.set overwrites on each match so last wins.

criteria_results.criterion: Step nodes show matching rule color as background tint at 15% opacity
criteria_results.evidence: step-node.tsx line 53: backgroundColor uses coloringTint + hex 26 as alpha. 0x26=38/255=14.9% opacity.

criteria_results.criterion: Steps matching no rule show default background
criteria_results.evidence: step-node.tsx: coloringTint defaults to null. When null, no backgroundColor style applied.

criteria_results.criterion: Coloring applies to process canvas step nodes only (not journey)
criteria_results.evidence: ColoringTintContext.Provider wraps only CanvasView. No journey files in BUILD_RESULT_2.

criteria_results.criterion: Rules apply in real-time as created/edited
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx: ColoringPanel receives onRulesChange=setColoringRules. Triggers useMemo recomputation immediately.

criteria_results.criterion: POST route validates color with HEX_COLOR_REGEX
criteria_results.evidence: coloring-rules/route.ts line 8: HEX_COLOR_REGEX=/^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i. Lines 60-62: errorResponse 400 on failure.

criteria_results.criterion: PATCH route validates color with HEX_COLOR_REGEX when color field is present
PATCH route validates criteria_type against VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES when present
criteria_results.evidence: [id]/route.ts lines 7-8: VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES const tuple. Lines 39-48: errorResponse 400.
BUILD_RESULT_2.json typecheck: pass, 0 errors. Build: Compiled successfully in 5.5s.

quality_gate.notes: 1 console error: 404 on /favicon.ico (pre-existing). Canvas rendered cleanly. Activity page not browser-tested (iter 96 not deployed; local dev unavailable).

improvements_found.observation: Paintbrush button has no indicator that coloring rules are currently active. Users cannot tell at a glance whether tinting is on after reloading.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a small dot indicator on the button when any active coloring rule exists.

improvements_found.observation: has_role criteria type appears in the dropdown but is not visually evaluated. Users who create a has_role rule see no canvas effect and no explanation.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Show inline warning when has_role is selected, or remove from dropdown until implemented.

improvements_found.observation: Activity sidebar nav link absent from production (iter 96 not deployed). If link was dropped in a prior merge the page is undiscoverable.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Confirm sidebar.tsx Activity link present after iter 96 deployment. Per iter 91 it was present -- verify not dropped.
